'''Red 5'''<ref name="CCG-Red5" /> was a [[T-65B X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65B X-wing starfighter]]<ref name="Preview" /> in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CCG-Red5" /> The fighter was assigned to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to fly during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], with [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] serving as the craft's [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].<ref name="ANH" />

During the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Red 5 was hit by weapons fire from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] [[Black 4]].<ref name="CCG-Black4">{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Black 4}}</ref> As the battle progressed, Skywalker piloted Red 5 into the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Meridian trench/Legends|meridian trench]] alongside [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] in [[Red 3]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] in [[Red 2]]. Pursued by Imperial fighters led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], Red 5 sustained a hit that damaged R2-D2. Despite the loss of his astromech, Skywalker successfully fired a pair of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] into the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station's]] [[Thermal exhaust port/Legends|thermal exhaust port]], destroying the Death Star.<ref name="ANH" />

Red 5 was destroyed the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] after the Battle of Yavin.<ref name="Preview" /> Skywalker, taking flight in his X-wing, encountered a lone [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] that had survived the destruction of the Death Star. Skywalker engaged the TIE, but his fighter's [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] were not energized since the Rebel had failed to carry out routine checks on the craft. Instead, Skywalker deliberately crashed into the TIE fighter, causing them both to crash onto Yavin 4.<ref name="SD" />
